description_long: This motorcycle features a classic, vintage design with a low-slung frame and a teardrop-shaped fuel tank finished in a dark, weathered brown. The bike is equipped with two large, spoked wheels and prominent fenders that cover much of the tires, giving it a robust and sturdy appearance. The seat is a single, slightly curved saddle positioned above the rear wheel, with a simple, exposed suspension system beneath. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, with visible grips and control levers, and the headlight is round and mounted high at the front. The exhaust pipes are long and run parallel to the frame, ending just past the rear wheel. The overall construction suggests a heavy use of metal, with some rubber components for the tires and grips, and the finish is mostly matte with some subtle metallic reflections.
description: A vintage-style motorcycle with a dark brown teardrop tank, spoked wheels, wide handlebars, and long exhaust pipes. The design is robust, with prominent fenders and a single saddle seat.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the teardrop tank, long exhaust, and spoked wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the round headlight, wide handlebars, and front fender.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, revealing the other side of the tank, engine, and rear fender.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the saddle seat, rear fender, and dual exhaust pipes.
